'''dhajodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichrome|nichrome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichrome|nichrome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhajodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjedheth|dhæjedheth]] || [[word:dhæjedhej|dhæjedhej]] || [[word:dhæjedhesh|dhæjedhesh]] || [[word:dhæjedhe|dhæjedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajojodhoth|dhajojodhoth]] || [[word:dhajojodhoj|dhajojodhoj]] || [[word:dhajojodhosh|dhajojodhosh]] || [[word:dhajojodho|dhajojodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajodhoth|dhajodhoth]] || [[word:dhajodhoj|dhajodhoj]] || [[word:dhajodhosh|dhajodhosh]] || [[word:dhajodho|dhajodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajofdhoth|dhajofdhoth]] || [[word:dhajofdhoj|dhajofdhoj]] || [[word:dhajofdhosh|dhajofdhosh]] || [[word:dhajofdhof|dhajofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajodhotho|dhajodhotho]] || [[word:dhajodhojo|dhajodhojo]] || [[word:dhajodhosho|dhajodhosho]] || [[word:dhajodhoko|dhajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajodhoth|dhajodhoth]] || [[word:dhajodhoj|dhajodhoj]] || [[word:dhajodhosh|dhajodhosh]] || [[word:dhajodho|dhajodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajodhothol|dhajodhothol]] || [[word:dhajodhojol|dhajodhojol]] || [[word:dhajodhoshol|dhajodhoshol]] || [[word:dhajodhokol|dhajodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajodhothotho|dhajodhothotho]] || [[word:dhajodhojojo|dhajodhojojo]] || [[word:dhajodhoshosho|dhajodhoshosho]] || [[word:dhajodhoko|dhajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajodhothon|dhajodhothon]] || [[word:dhajodhojon|dhajodhojon]] || [[word:dhajodhoshon|dhajodhoshon]] || [[word:dhajodhokon|dhajodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajodhothoro|dhajodhothoro]] || [[word:dhajodhojoro|dhajodhojoro]] || [[word:dhajodhoshoro|dhajodhoshoro]] || [[word:dhajodhokoro|dhajodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
